brief: Customer is positive about rollout speed and support responsiveness, but flagged one renewal risk: admins want easier bulk export and clearer audit logging before expansion. Recommended follow-up is a product walkthrough focused on enterprise controls and migration confidence.
searchSummary: renewal risk, feature pain, onboarding friction
